summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by updating 'Launching Soon' to pre-launch messaging ('Pre-Launch' / 'Coming Soon') across SubsidiaryDetails.tsx, SubsidiaryGrid.tsx, and PlaceholderPage.tsx (confirmed via frontend-file-summaries.txt).
